identity.name: ConnectKar
identity.vision: A closed, verified digital ecosystem for township residents combining the utility of MyGate, the commerce of OLX, and the community of Instagram.

cards.marketplace: bg-white border border-border/50 rounded-xl overflow-hidden hover:border-primary/50 transition-all group
cards.service: bg-white p-6 rounded-xl border border-border shadow-sm hover:shadow-md hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all
cards.community: bg-gradient-to-br from-white to-slate-50 border border-border rounded-xl p-5

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg font-medium transition-colors shadow-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/90 h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg font-medium transition-colors shadow-sm
buttons.outline: border border-input bg-background hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg transition-colors
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg transition-colors

badges.verified: inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700 border border-emerald-200
badges.pending: inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold bg-amber-100 text-amber-700 border border-amber-200
badges.society: inline-flex items-center px-2 py-1 rounded-md text-xs font-medium bg-slate-100 text-slate-600

inputs.default: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

layouts.dashboard: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-6
layouts.marketplace_grid: grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-6

icons.style: Stroke width 1.5px or 2px, consistent sizing (w-4 h-4 for small, w-5 h-5 for medium, w-6 h-6 for large)

instructions_to_main_agent: Install framer-motion if not already present: yarn add framer-motion
Use 'Manrope' for all headings to give a modern, friendly, yet trusted feel.
Use 'Inter' for body text to ensure maximum readability for lists and descriptions.
Implement the 'Verification' flow strictly. Users without verification cannot access the main dashboard (or have read-only access).
The 'Home' page should use a 'Bento Grid' layout to show the most important categories (Vehicles, Marketplace, Events) at a glance.
Use the specific image URLs provided for category placeholders and demo data.
Ensure the mobile experience is flawless - bottom navigation is mandatory for mobile views.
Use the primary color (#0F766E) for primary actions and the secondary color (#F97316) for urgent actions (like 'Sell Item' or 'Alert').
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements for testing.
Do NOT use gradients for backgrounds. Use clean solid colors or subtle patterns/textures if absolutely necessary, but prioritize clean whitespace.
Shadcn UI components are preferred. Customize them using the Tailwind classes provided in the 'components' section.
For .js files, ensure you are importing React and other hooks correctly. Do not use TypeScript syntax.
Create a 'Layout' component that handles the responsive navigation (Top bar desktop / Bottom bar mobile).
universal_guidelines: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚 for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
Use 'sonner' for toasts. Sonner component are located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx
